data.title: Alpine Bank founder Bob Young passes away on December 11, 2025 in Florida, surrounded by loved ones.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Florida, Bob Young passed away peacefully, leaving behind a grieving family and friends. This beloved father, life partner, grandfather, and friend will be deeply missed. The Young family announced the sad news from Glenwood Springs, Colorado, on December 12, 2025, without specifying the cause of death. The exact age of Bob at the time of his passing was not disclosed. The loss of this cherished individual has undoubtedly left a significant impact on those who knew him.
No large oil tankers have sailed from Venezuela since us vessel seizure on Wednesday. Exports at minimum - Shipping Data Sources.

data.title: Lithium Royalty Corp. praises Power Metals for offtake deal with Albemarle; LRC holds 2.0% GOR royalty on project. Albemarle is a $16B company.
data.description: In Toronto, Lithium Royalty Corp. (TSX: LIRC) congratulates Power Metals Corp. on its cesium concentrate offtake agreement with Albemarle Corporation. Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) is a formidable company with a market value of US$16 billion and a significant presence in critical minerals like lithium and cesium. LRC, holding a 2.0% GOR royalty on Power Metals’ Case Lake project, commends this significant milestone. Albemarle's acquisition of the offtake rights signifies a positive development in the sector.

data.title: Global food waste recycling machine market expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.6% from 2025 to 2031 due to rising food waste and environmental concerns.
data.description: In Dublin, an updated report on the Food Waste Recycling Machine Market is now available, offering insights, trends, forecasts, and competitive analysis up to 2031. The report, added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, projects a 6.6% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) for the global food waste recycling machine market between 2025 and 2031. This growth is primarily attributed to factors such as the escalating volume of food waste generated by commercial establishments, heightened environmental consciousness, and increasing governmental backing for waste management initiatives. The report further highlights key segments within the market, providing valuable information for industry players.

data.title: Humanity tools expand global app w/World Chat, DeFi yield via Morpho & QR payments at one million+ merchants in Argentina.
data.description: The latest update includes the addition of World Chat feature with end-to-end encryption for enhanced security. Users can also now access DeFi-powered yield through Morpho. Additionally, QR-code payments can be made at over one million merchants in Argentina, streamlining transactions.

data.title: Global vehicle subscription market to grow at CAGR of 18.8% from 2025 to 2031. Major drivers include cost-effective models and digital platforms.
data.description: The latest report on the Vehicle Subscription Market indicates a promising outlook, forecasting significant growth potential. The global market is projected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.8% between 2025 and 2031. Key factors driving this growth include the increasing popularity of cost-effective subscription models, the expansion of digital platforms and mobile accessibility, as well as the uptick in investments in subscription services. This trend signals a shift towards innovative and convenient vehicle ownership models in the automotive industry.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $90,000, Ethereum at $3,076.27. 119,115 traders liquidated recently. Crypto market seeks catalysts.
data.description: Bitcoin has dropped to $90,249.67 amidst sideways trading on Friday. Ethereum stands at $3,076.27, Solana at $132.33, XRP at $2.01, Dogecoin at $0.1364, and Shiba Inu at $0.05206. Coinglass data reveals that 119,115 traders faced liquidation recently. Source: Benzinga.com

data.title: XRP to be accessible on Ethereum and Solana for DeFi, expanding its reach beyond Ripple network.
data.description: XRP, a cryptocurrency associated with Ripple, is poised to expand its usage within the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector by integrating with other prominent layer-1 networks such as Solana and Ethereum. This development will enable XRP to be utilized in a wider range of DeFi applications beyond its current network. Integration with Solana and Ethereum will further enhance the interoperability of XRP and potentially contribute to increased adoption within the DeFi ecosystem.

data.title: Victra chosen as a top company for compensation & culture, ranking #71 for Compensation and #75 for Culture. #EmployeeGrowth #RewardingCulture.
data.description: Victra has been recognized as the 71st best company for compensation and the 75th for company culture. Based in Raleigh, N.C., Victra is the largest exclusive authorized Verizon retailer in the U.S. The company emphasizes employee growth and a rewarding workplace culture.
Week Ahead: Economic Indicators 15th – 19th December (US)

data.title: Costco sells record 4.5M pies for Thanksgiving 2025, breaking Black Friday online orders. Stock rising.
data.description: During a recent conference call, Costco Wholesale Corp. revealed that they experienced a surge in pie sales this Thanksgiving season, breaking records in the process. CEO Ron Vachris reported that the company sold an impressive 4.5 million pies in the three days leading up to Thanksgiving 2025. Additionally, executives highlighted a significant increase in non-food Black Friday online orders. The success in sales contributed to a notable movement in COST stock prices. For further details, check out the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global vocal biomarker market to grow at 12.5% CAGR from 2025 to 2031, driven by voice disorders and AI adoption.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report on the Vocal Biomarker Market predicts significant growth opportunities in the industry, forecasting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.5% from 2025 to 2031. Factors driving this expansion include the rising incidence of voice disorders, the increased utilization of Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies, and a growing need for remote diagnostic solutions. The report highlights the potential for a promising future in the global vocal biomarker market.

data.title: Dow Jones down, AI stocks weak, Broadcom slumps after earnings, Nasdaq lags, Cannabis stocks surge.
data.description: Today's stock market saw a decline in the Dow Jones index, with AI stocks struggling, particularly as Broadcom stock plummeted following its earnings report. The Nasdaq lagged as well. Cannabis stocks, on the other hand, surged. The live coverage of these events can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Oracle stock fell due to delays in data center construction for OpenAI, pushed from 2027 to 2028. Stock recovers slightly.
data.description: Following a report by Bloomberg indicating a delay in the completion of data centers for OpenAI, Oracle experienced a drop in stock value. The centers, originally planned for completion in 2027, are now expected to be finished by 2028. Despite this setback, Oracle has reassured investors that the project remains 'on track'. Subsequently, the stock saw a partial recovery after the initial decline. The incident was covered by Investor's Business Daily.
Brent Crude futures settle at $61.12/bbl, down 16 cents, 0.26%.

data.title: Several leading crypto companies, including Paxos, Ripple, and Circle, have received conditional approvals to operate as national trust banks in the US under the OCC's supervision.
data.description: The recent conditional approvals have opened up opportunities for large crypto firms to function as national trust banks in the US, subject to the oversight of the OCC. This development signifies a significant step in allowing these companies to operate within the national banking framework.
